description: Grants the window-lifecycle commands that a watcher-opened devserver window (lib-*) reaches over a devserver tunnel (https://*.devserver.chan.app): abandon_devserver_for_window (disconnect-overlay Abandon), request_close_window (close-confirm overlay Close / Cmd+Shift+W), and hide_window_from_close_confirm (close-confirm overlay Hide). workspace.json already puts all three in the workspace-window set for lib-* windows, but its remote.urls is loopback-only, so from a tunnel origin these are ACL-denied and the clicks are silent no-ops. Scoped to these window-lifecycle commands on lib-* windows over the tunnel origin, mirroring the tight remote scope on workspace.json / launcher-events.json: no other remote IPC reaches devserver-served content.
